   - (node-first-pass-next ?n ?r ?n)
   - increase cost

2. `rotate-first-pass`: Updates the first pass.
   Parameters: ?nstart, ?r, ?n1, ?n2, ?n2x, ?n2y, ?n2dir, ?n2setdir
   Preconditions:
   - CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2
   - NEXT-DIRECTION ?n2dir ?r ?n2setdir
   - node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1
   - at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y
   - heading ?n2 ?n2dir

   - not (node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1)
   - node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n2
   - not (at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y)
   - free ?n2x ?n2y
   - not (heading ?n2 ?n2dir)
   - heading ?n2 ?n2setdir
   - increase cost

3. `rotate-first-pass-end`: Ends the first pass.
   Parameters: ?nstart, ?r, ?n1, ?n2, ?n2x, ?n2y
   Preconditions:
   - END-NODE ?n2
   - CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2
   - node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1

   Effects:
   - not (at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y)
   - free ?n2x ?n2y
   - not (node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1)
   - node-second-pass-next ?nstart
   - increase cost

4. `rotate-second-pass`: Updates the second pass.
   Parameters: ?n1, ?n1x, ?n1y, ?n1dir, ?n2, ?n2x, ?n2y
   Preconditions:
   - CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2
   - node-second-pass-next ?n1
   - at ?n1 ?n1x ?n1y
   - heading ?n1 ?n1dir
   - free ?n2x ?n2y

   Effects:
   - not (node-second-pass-next ?n1)
   - node-second-pass-next ?n2
   - not (free ?n2x ?n2y)
   - at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y
   - increase cost

5. `rotate-second-pass-end`: Ends the second pass.
   Parameters: ?n
   Preconditions:
   - END-NODE ?n
   - node-second-pass-next ?n
   Effects:
   - not (node-second-pass-next ?n)
   - not (rotating)
   - increase cost
